title: limonium recurvum var. humile
intro: Limonium recurvum var. humile, also known as a compact form of Sea Lavender or Dwarf Sea Lavender, is a low-growing, perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Limonium recurvum var. humile include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a natural antiseptic to promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
